summary: Heart Sutra — single most concentrated sunyata_emptiness source
description:
**Parent:** Corpus Expansion Tier 1 (child 7 of 8)

## Source

- **Translator / license:** Max Müller, in SBE49 (Cowell/Müller/Takakusu), 1894. US-PD. (Conze/ATI versions are modern-copyright — this is the clean PD route.)
- **URLs:**
  - Smaller (standard) recension https://www.sacred-texts.com/bud/sbe49/sbe4931.htm (~10KB)
  - Larger recension https://www.sacred-texts.com/bud/sbe49/sbe4930.htm (~12KB)
- Both confirmed to contain "emptiness" + the *gate gate* mantra.
- **Format:** `html` × 2 entries (`heart-sutra-smaller`, `heart-sutra-larger`). Or one entry with the recension that matters most — implementer's call.
- **Chunking:** `page-as-chunk` (1–2 chunks total).

## SBE downloader note

SBE source — once todo:5a794b5e patch is the downloader default, no per-config Footnotes pre_strip is needed. Until that point, add `pre_strip_patterns = ['(?m)^Footnotes\b[\s\S]*$']` to the chunking config (matches the Upanishads + pagan precedent).

## Concept payload

The single most concentrated `sunyata_emptiness` / "form is emptiness" source. The exact gap in Buddhism, in two tiny pages.

## Ref

`docs/corpus-expansion-candidates.md` §3.7

resolution.note: Both Heart Sutra recensions acquired and chunked: smaller (1 chunk, 664 tok) + larger (2 chunks, 1068 tok). Sources floating concept sunyata_emptiness. Patched-extractor SBE ingest.
